title: Arena Pixelmon
description: Modpack Oficial do Servidor Arena Pixelmon
body:
**Arena Pixelmon - Pixelmon Modpack**

"Welcome to the Arena Pixelmon Minecraft server, a world where the journey to become a Pokémon master comes to life! Our server offers an immersive and exciting experience for Pokémon and Minecraft fans alike. With a carefully curated modpack, we combine classic Minecraft elements with the thrilling addition of Pixelmon, allowing players to explore, train, and battle with their favorite Pokémon in a multiplayer environment."
